title: BetterJoinSpawn
description: Highly configurable plugin, join/leave/quit/login messages, Authme/PAPI support , tp on join/login , ...
body:
# Why this plugin
Allows you to set messages/titles for players when they connect/login/register/disconnect/..., or play sounds or launch fireworks and everything is optional, so plugin can be used anywhere with other plugins

# Features

- Teleport to spawn or login location on join/login/respawn or using /spawn command.
- Teleport to last location after /login
- Configurable join/leave/quit messages or option to hide them.
- Commands on join/login/register performed as console/player
- Support for AuthMe/LoginSecurity/OpeNLogin plugin with additional messages for login and registration.
- Titles, sounds and fireworks for all events for enhanced player experience. (TheAPI required)
- Colors and hex colors for customizing messages. (example &#43ffb2 &a &4 &3)
- PlaceholderAPI support
- Plugin has ability to work with vanish plugins, by checking if another plugin hides join/leave messages, if this happens message will remain hidden and firework will not appear
- Everything can be turned on and off
- Configuration updates automatically when new options are set in new versions

# What is required

- Spigot/Paper/... 1.8+
- Java 8+

# What is required for some features

- TheAPI (titles/subtitles)
- PlaceholderAPI (placeholders)
- Authme (messages,teleport after /login)

# Commands
- /betterjoinspawn (reload)
    perms: betterjoinspawn.reload

- /spawn (player name)
perms: betterjoinspawn.others (Needed when teleporting another player)

- /setspawn [joinspawn/loginspawn]
perms: betterjoinspawn.setspawn

## Explanation:
- [] required      () optional
- joinspawn - on join
- loginspawn - on login after /login /register

# Support/bug reports/suggestions

- Discussion on [spigotmc.org](https://www.spigotmc.org/threads/betterjoinspawn.604746/)
- Discord server https://discord.gg/VrQhPWhAnZ

# Setup

- open config.yml
- turn on what you want and need (everything is off*)
- set up your own messages
- set spawns via /setspawn
-  restart/reload plugin
-  test whether features are working


# What might be added

- support for other login plugins? (definitely)
- bungeecord support (maybe)
- actionbar
- missing something? Write it now
